description: v0.6.3 canonical workload — 1000-memory deterministic seed for the curator-cycle bench. Every entry is curator-eligible (public namespace, content >= 50 chars, no auto_tags) so a single sweep exercises auto_tag + detect_contradiction up to max_ops_per_cycle. Schema mirrors crate::models::CreateMemory for direct serde_json::from_str into the bench harness.
